relative_path: Xenium experiment 2025/20260506_Xenium experiment protocol/Xenium protocol details.docx
full_text:
Xenium FFPE sample preparation + 3-day Xenium experiment

Major steps and estimated timeline

All steps are specified in protocols

saved to gDrive (whole documents):

Printed to lab (only relevant pages):

FFPE Tissue Sectioning & Section placement

CG000578_Demonstrated_Protocol_XeniumInSituProtocolsFFPE_TissuePreparationGuide_Rev_C Relevant pages: 9-17, and 29-33

Microtome parts were wiped with RNAse before starting cutting sections

section thickness 5 µm

The blade was changed between each sample. New blade was wiped with RNAse before using

imageable area outlined by a white line: 12 mm x 24 mm

sample positioning area: 235 mm2 (10.45 mm x 22.45 mm) surrounded by fiducials

Empty paraffin can overlap fiducials

XENIUM EXPERIMENT (3 day protocol)

DAY 1 (4,5h):

Needed protocols:

10x_CG000580_Demonstrated_Protocol_Xenium_FFPE_Deparaffinization_Decrosslinking_RevE Relevant pages: 31-45 (Step 1)

CG000749_XeniumInSitu_GeneExp_CellSegmentation_User_Guide_RevB Relevant pages 42-49 (Step 2)

Deparaffinization & Decrosslinking

Deparaffinization: 2h incubation

Deparaffinization ethanol + xylene series: 1h active

Decrosslinking incubation: 30 min + 30 min active

continue straight away to probe hybridization

Probe hybridization

Buffer preparation: 20 min

Preparation of probes and hybridization mix: 10 in active

Probe hybridization: 16-24h overnight incubation

DAY 2 (7h):

Needed protocols:

01_CG000749_XeniumInSitu_GeneExp_CellSegmentation_User_Guide_RevB Relevant pages 50-77

Post hybridization wash

Thawing buffer: 30 min

Post hybridization wash: 30 min incubation

Ligation

Washes + reagent preparation: 5 min

Ligation: 2h incubation

Amplification

Reagent preparation + washes: 5 min

Amplification: 2h incubation

Washes: 5 min

Cell Segmentation Staining

Buffer prep. + washes: 15 min

Block and stain (+ stain mix preparation at the same time): 1h incubation

Stain mix: 16-24h overnight incubation

DAY 3 (3,5h):

Needed protocols:

02_CG000749_XeniumInSitu_GeneExp_CellSegmentation_User_Guide_RevB Relevant pages 50-77 (Steps 1-3)

03_CG000584_Xenium_Analyzer_UserGuide_RevJ Relevant pages 33-51, 62-86 (Step 4)

Stain Enhancement

Thawing and reagent prep: 10 min

Washes + 20 min incubation: 30 min

Autofluorescence Quenching

Reagent prep+incubation: 15 min

Washes+incubation: 15 min

Drying+washes: 15 min

Nuclei Staining

Nuclei staining buffer + staining: 5 min

Preparing Xenium analyzer and buffers (around 2h)

Panel upload

Network connectivity

Readiness test

Preparing Module plates A-C (thawing+centrifuging)

Buffer 1-4 preparation

Loading buffers, consumables and slides to the machine

Cleaning fiducial areas from slides (if covered)

Selecting ROIs (=sample areas) and registering slide IDs

Start a run (approx 50h for 2 slides)

After the run is completed

Deload machine

Data output exporting
